## 2026-01-06

### Changes

- Adds a fix to un-register all receivers when sdk is finished

### Requirements

| Name       | Version |
| ---------- | ------- |
| Gradle     | 8.7     |
| AGP        | 8.6     |
| Kotlin  | 2.1.21 |
| Min SDK    | 21      |
| Target SDK | 36      |

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/atomicfi/atomic-transact-android/compare/v3.15.1...v3.15.2
